sentences.arabic: جَرَّبْتُ فِي كُلِّ يَوْمٍ طَبَقًا مَحَلِّيًّا جَدِيدًا خِلَالَ إِقَامَتِي.
sentences.translation: Svaki dan sam probao novo lokalno jelo tokom svog boravka.
sentences.translationEn: Every day I tried a new local dish during my stay.

sentences.arabic: أَكَلْتُ الْكُسْكُسَ وَالْمَنْسَفَ وَالشَّاوُرْمَا فِي بُلْدَانٍ مُخْتَلِفَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Jeo sam kuskus, mansaf i šavarmu u različitim zemljama.
sentences.translationEn: I ate couscous, mansaf, and shawarma in different countries.

sentences.arabic: سَأَلْتُ الطَّبَّاخَ عَنِ الْمُكَوِّنَاتِ وَطَرِيقَةِ التَّحْضِيرِ.
sentences.translation: Pitao sam kuhara o sastojcima i načinu pripreme.
sentences.translationEn: I asked the cook about the ingredients and preparation method.

sentences.arabic: كَتَبْتُ بَعْضَ الْوَصَفَاتِ فِي دَفْتَرِي لِأُجَرِّبَهَا فِي بَيْتِي.
sentences.translation: Zapisao sam neke recepte u svom dnevniku da ih isprobam kod kuće.
sentences.translationEn: I wrote down some recipes in my journal to try at home.

sentences.arabic: الأَكْلُ الْمَحَلِّيُّ هُوَ أَفْضَلُ طَرِيقَةٍ لِفَهْمِ ثَقَافَةِ بَلَدٍ مَا.
sentences.translation: Lokalna hrana je najbolji način za razumijevanje kulture neke zemlje.
sentences.translationEn: Local food is the best way to understand a country's culture.
